description_long: This is a male police officer dressed in a standard dark navy blue patrol uniform, featuring a long-sleeve buttoned shirt with gold trim and matching trousers. The shirt displays a visible police badge on the left chest and a nameplate on the right, with shoulder patches on both arms. The officer wears a dark blue peaked cap adorned with a metallic badge at the front. A black utility belt is equipped with various pouches and tools, including what appear to be handcuffs and other standard police gear. Black shoes complete the uniform, and the officer's stance is upright with arms extended horizontally. The overall appearance is formal, authoritative, and suitable for urban law enforcement duties.
description: A male police officer in a dark navy blue patrol uniform with a peaked cap, badge, and utility belt, standing upright with arms outstretched. The uniform features gold trim, shoulder patches, and standard police equipment.
description_view_0: Front view showing the officer's face, chest badge, nameplate, and full uniform details including the utility belt and outstretched arms.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the officer, the side of the cap, and the equipment on the left side of the utility belt.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the uniform, the back of the cap, and the full length of the utility belt with pouches visible.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the officer's profile, the right arm patch, and the equipment on the right side of the utility belt.
attribute_uniform_type: Standard police patrol uniform with long-sleeve navy blue shirt, matching trousers, gold trim, shoulder patches, and a black utility belt.
attribute_headgear_style: Dark navy blue peaked cap with a metallic badge at the front
